    35.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'm hot. Too hot. I think... I think this is it. The engine's finally cooked.note: Karlach in slowly immolating as she is using the last of her willpower to stay on the material planeTELEPATHYORI_Astarion_State_StayedVampireSpawnAvatar!Full-IllithidAstarion

            • +
              174.Origin_Intro_Karlach: We did it. I did it. The city's going to be all right. My friends are going to be all right. I can let go.TELEPATHY

              Flags and Tags

              tagstype node | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Karlach
              • TELEPATHY {ad247b59-d101-4f04-99ef-471c65678662}

              • +
                41.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'm slipping. I can't hang on. I... what's happening?!TELEPATHY

                Flags and Tags

                tagstype node | speaker 0 Origin_Intro_Karlach
                • TELEPATHY {ad247b59-d101-4f04-99ef-471c65678662}

                • •
                  95.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Goodbye, sun. Goodbye, sea. Good- [End]note: She explodes in a great riot of colour and flames. From the ashes below, a wisp floats up, levels with the eyeline, then flies away, up, to the heavens.TELEPATHYORI_Karlach_State_EngineBurnedOut

      • +
        68.ShadowheartIllusion: Karlach... I thought after all we've survived, maybe one last miracle would rear its head... but no. I'm sorry.DEPRECATEDORI_State_PartneredWithShadowheartShadowheartEnemy of Shar

          164.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Karlach, the very best of us. You were always the hero. My hero.

          133.ShadowheartIllusion: Karlach... I thought after all we've survived, maybe one last miracle would rear its head... but no. I'm sorry.
          END_RandomCompanion_PickedShadowheart

                      3.Player: No! There's still time - one last chance to find a way back to Avernus. I could live... in a way. I could live...

                        169.Player: Goodbye, sun. Goodbye, sea. Good- [End]note: She explodes in a great riot of colour and flames. From the ashes below, a wisp floats up, levels with the eyeline, then flies away, up, to the heavens.TELEPATHYKarlachORI_Karlach_State_EngineBurnedOut

                        109.Player: COME ON, DEATH! TAKE ME! I'M READY! I'M READY! I'M - [End]note: She explodes in a great riot of colour and flames. From the ashes below, a wisp floats up, levels with the eyeline, then flies away, up, to the heavens.TELEPATHYKarlachORI_Karlach_State_EngineBurnedOut

        171.Player: Karlach... I thought after all we've survived, maybe one last miracle would rear its head... but no. I'm sorry.ORI_State_PartneredWithShadowheartShadowheartEnemy of Shar

        154.Player: Karlach... the Lady of Loss takes everything in the end, but I thought we'd have some more time yet. I'm sorry.ORI_State_PartneredWithShadowheartShadowheart!Enemy of Shar

        93.Player: Karlach... I... I love you. You taught me the impossible. In all my immortality, I'll never forget you.ORI_State_PartneredWithAstarionAstarion

          • See Node 84 (Gale) No, Karlach. Stay with me, please. We've shared too much to part like this.

      92.Jump to Node 158

      Metadata

      Node Type: JumpUUID: 74ecee94-1c1d-ef36-c40f-c2293dc07680Jump Target: Node 158 (cb98a427-c814-0e8a-eab7-51764729e36b)Jump Target Point: 1
  • -
    192.Origin_Intro_Karlach: We did it, soldier. The city's going to be all right. And so are you.note: (Her back is to the player; she's staring out at a vista. When she speaks she's a little strained, out of breath. On 'And so are you' she turns her head toward us; we see her in quarter profile.)

    Metadata

      49.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Engine's finally cooked. Held on just long enough.note: (She turns around. Her engine is pulsating dangerously.)

        62.Origin_Intro_Karlach: So? H-how'd I do?note: (She staggers forward, catching herself)

            124.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Careful - hot.note: She falls to her knees, holds a hand up as the player tries to approach her, says 'Careful - hot'. She's affected by the heat, it's starting to overwhelm her.

                157.Origin_Intro_Karlach: It's the one thing I can't beat, isn't it? Same below as above. I love. You.note: (Her gaze moves upward, toward the sky, as though she's starting to lose consciousness. She looks at hte player on 'you' and says it with love).

                            73.Origin_Intro_Wyll: No. Stop this. Come with me, Karlach. Come to Avernus. Live.

                            137.Origin_Intro_Wyll: No. Stop. I won't allow this. Karlach, you're coming with me - back to Avernus.

                                118.Player: It's your decision, Karlach. You have to choose.ORI_Karlach_Event_ReturnToHellEND_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell

                                • +
                                  57.Origin_Intro_Wyll: So? What do you say? Die here, now, or live on with the Blade of Avernus at your side? Zariel won't touch you. I swear it, Karlach.

                                  Metadata

                                    103.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Fine. I'll go. Wyll. With you.note: [Choices] Karlach on hands on knees state.

                                113.Player: Go Karlach. Wyll will be with you; you won't be alone anymore.!ORI_State_PartneredWithWyllORI_Karlach_Event_ReturnToHellEND_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell

                              • +
                                104.Player: I love you, Wyll, but I can't follow you to Avernus. The two of you should go together.ORI_State_PartneredWithWyllORI_Karlach_Event_ReturnToHellEND_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell

                                Flags and Tags

                                checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                • ORI_State_PartneredWithWyll {5db4c1b6-3c42-43ae-aa85-1844acbf5a1d} = True
                                settype Global
                                • ORI_Karlach_Event_ReturnToHell {bbec205a-5b1e-8488-f03a-10f0caaa5471} = True
                                settype Object | speaker 5 Origin_Intro_Wyll
                                • END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell {35150cbf-2c72-1049-37ed-14dbc3736135} = True

                                Metadata

                                • See Node 106 (No Speaker) Alias to Node 82
                              • +
                                72.Player: It's your decision, Karlach. You have to choose. Wyll will go with you. Zariel won't be able to touch you.!ORI_State_PartneredWithWyllORI_Karlach_Event_ReturnToHellEND_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell

                                Flags and Tags

                                42.Player: It's your decision, Karlach. You have to choose. We'll go with you. Zariel won't be able to touch us.ORI_State_PartneredWithWyllORI_Karlach_Event_ReturnToHellEND_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell

                                • +
                                  24.Origin_Intro_Wyll: So? What do you say? Die here, now, or live on with people who love you. Zariel won't touch you. I swear it, Karlach.END_GameFinale_State_WyllKarlachAndAvatarInHellEND_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell

                                  Flags and Tags

                                  settype Global

                                        98.Origin_Intro_Wyll: Thank the gods you've seen sense. Come! To Avernus we go - our next adventure awaits.

                                        Metadata

                              • +
                                97.Player: Enough, Karlach. The three of us will make a new life in Avernus. Together.ORI_Karlach_Event_ReturnToHellEND_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell

                                Flags and Tags

                                settype Global
                                • ORI_Karlach_Event_ReturnToHell {bbec205a-5b1e-8488-f03a-10f0caaa5471} = True
                                settype Object | speaker 1 Player
                                • END_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell {35150cbf-2c72-1049-37ed-14dbc3736135} = True

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 801cb173-c5fc-cab7-da87-c408d3f25fcdSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h0040980cgd7d9g4fb3g99ebgc85141be515dText UUID: bb9e7d34-6128-4b30-a588-140805a45272Show Once: True
                                • See Node 24 (Origin_Intro_Wyll) So? What do you say? Die here, now, or live on with people who love you. Zariel won't touch you. I swear it, Karlach.
                              • +
                                191.Player: Karlach, my love, I can't watch you die. Wyll - I'll go with her. It should be me.ORI_State_PartneredWithKarlachORI_Karlach_Event_ReturnToHellEND_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell

                                Flags and Tags

                        37.Player: No! No Karlach! I won't allow this. You're going to live. We're returning to Avernus. Together.

                            6.Player: I know why you're afraid. I know why you don't want to go. But I'll be with you this time. I won't leave your side.ORI_Karlach_Event_ReturnToHellEND_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell

                              127.Origin_Intro_Karlach: All right. All right. But we have to go. Now.note: [Choices] Karlach on hands on knees state.

                            36.Player: You have to choose, Karlach. It's your last chance. Do we go to Avernus, together? Or would you rather die here in Faerûn?ORI_Karlach_Event_ReturnToHellEND_GameFinale_Event_AccompanyKarlachToHell

                          31.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'm ready. I... I... Stand back, I'm going to - [End]note: She explodes in a great riot of colour and flames. The player recoils against the light and heat. From the ashes below, a wisp floats up, levels with the player, then flies away, up, to the heavens. [Choices] Karlach on hands on knees state.

            161.Origin_Intro_Karlach: For you. And for the city, and for myself, and blah, blah. But most of all, for you.note: (She approaches and puts a hand on the player's face. Then she staggers backward.) ORI_State_PartneredWithKarlach

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Object | speaker 1 Player

            75.Origin_Intro_Karlach: So were you. My friend. My companion. I adore you.note: She approaches and puts a hand on the player's shoulder, gives it a hearty shake. She staggers backward.

            Metadata

              159.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Careful - hot.note: She falls to her knees, holds a hand up as the player tries to approach her, says 'Careful - hot'. She's affected by the heat, it's starting to overwhelm her.

                188.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I never gave up. I did my best. I did my best.note: Talking to self. Focusing through the agony of the fire, but still with her swagger.

                • +
                  88.Origin_Intro_Karlach: It's the one thing I can't beat, isn't it? I wanted to live. In my city. With my friends.note: (Her gaze moves upward, toward the sky, as though she's starting to lose consciousness. She looks at hte player on 'you' and says it with love).

                    186.Origin_Intro_Karlach: But life is for the living. And I saw - gods!note: [Choices] Karlach on knees state.

            96.Origin_Intro_Karlach: And I'd do it again. Whatever it took. For the city. For the world. But most of all, for you.note: (She approaches and puts a hand on the player's face. Then she staggers backward.) ORI_State_PartneredWithKarlach

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
            • ORI_State_PartneredWithKarlach {d9ff60fa-0af9-45d7-99b4-bd7c3f80ed12} = True

            46.Origin_Intro_Karlach: We did. Together. And now it's done.note: She approaches and puts a hand on the player's shoulder, gives it a hearty shake. She staggers backward.

            29.Origin_Intro_Karlach: It matters, my love. What we did here matters. What we have... has been everything.note: (She approaches and puts a hand on the player's face. Then she staggers backward.) ORI_State_PartneredWithKarlach

            27.Origin_Intro_Karlach: So it is. We gave this city back its life. We did that.note: She approaches and puts a hand on the player's shoulder, gives it a hearty shake. She staggers backward.

            Metadata
